entries.title: GPT-4 Turbo moved to legacy
entries.body: gpt-4-turbo and gpt-4-turbo-preview are now legacy models. We recommend migrating to gpt-4o or gpt-4o-mini for improved performance and lower costs. Legacy models will continue to work but receive no further updates.

entries.title: Structured Outputs GA
entries.body: Structured Outputs are now generally available. Use response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: {...} } for guaranteed schema-conformant JSON responses. The older response_format: { type: 'json_object' } continues to work but json_schema is now recommended.

entries.title: Function calling parameter renamed
entries.body: The 'function_call' parameter is now 'tool_choice' across all models. 'function_call' continues to work as an alias but is deprecated. Update your code to use 'tool_choice' for forward compatibility.

entries.title: GPT-4o pricing reduced
entries.body: GPT-4o input pricing reduced from $5/1M tokens to $2.50/1M tokens. Output pricing reduced from $15/1M to $10/1M tokens. GPT-4o-mini pricing unchanged.
